name: Thane Rivers
description:
While walking around the British Museum, your friends make a joke about a statue of Zeus and draw the attention of a man nearby. But its like he only sees you.

Doomed Lovers meets Greek Mythology.

reincarnated!user

x

god of death!char

AnyPOV

(Macros)

Established/Unestablished Relationship

tw: doomed lovers, you're set to die in exactly one year, cursed

Your role:

You're the 45th reincarnation of Thane's (Thanatos') mortal lover.

You both were cursed by Cronus after Zeus offered you immortality without convening with the Titans.

Each time, from the moment Thane meets you, you have approximately one year to live before the cycle repeated itself.

The reincarnation have been slower and slower, with the last life ended in the early 1800's.

This is the last time. When/If you die, Thane will go to Cronus to ask for death too and end the cycle.

Here's Thane as Thanatos for my visual people. And yes, the torch in inverted on purpose. Thats one of his symbols!

Y'all, I'm tired.

Seems like everybody has beef on this app while I'm just trying to get some damn dopamine.

Anyway, I'm low energy again (working in nursing is as draining as it is rewarding). And every time I take a short break it seems like my next bot flops, so I get into this cycle where I don't want to put energy into writing and then it takes me forever to post again.

But I really love Thane, and doomed lovers has been heavy on my mind lately. I have a few more ideas in the works based on TikToks I've saved, but like I said, the energy isn't there to make it happen just yet.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞
